rationale: Both reviews correctly flag the redundant `change` in `comul_includeRight`, but Review 1 additionally demands refactoring of the `map_id`/`map_comp` proofs (findings 3–4) whose `ext; induction; simp` pattern is standard Mathlib style and correct — acting on those would add unnecessary verbosity without improving correctness or clarity. Review 2 is more restrained, requesting only one clear fix and one debatable `simpa`→`simp only` change, so following it yields a leaner, equally correct PR.
